workshoptitle: VMware to OLVM Migration with Oracle Cloud Migrations

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Review the workshop scope, prerequisites, and end-to-end VMware to OLVM migration flow.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Create the Migration Compartment
tutorials.description: Create a dedicated OCI compartment for VMware to OLVM migration resources.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Prepare Source VMs for OLVM Migration
tutorials.description: Install or validate VirtIO drivers on Windows and Linux source VMs before replication.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Deploy the OCM Prerequisites Stack
tutorials.description: Configure, plan, apply, and verify the Oracle Cloud Migrations prerequisite stack.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Upload and Register the VDDK
tutorials.description: Upload the VDDK package to Object Storage and register it as an agent dependency.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Set Up the VMware Source Environment
tutorials.description: Store vCenter credentials, create the source environment, deploy the remote agent appliance, and register the agent.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Run VMware Asset Discovery
tutorials.description: Create the VMware asset source and discover source VMs in Oracle Cloud Migrations inventory.

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Set Up the OLVM Target Environment
tutorials.description: Store OLVM credentials and certificate material, create the OLVM asset source, and discover target assets.

tutorials.title: Lab 8: Create the OLVM Migration Project
tutorials.description: Create an OLVM migration project, add source assets, configure replication, and select target values.

tutorials.title: Lab 9: Replicate and Validate
tutorials.description: Replicate the selected VM, run the migration plan, validate the OLVM VM, and perform cutover when ready.

tutorials.title: Lab 10: Mark Complete and Clean Up
tutorials.description: Mark the migration project complete and clean up temporary migration resources.

tutorials.title: Lab 11: Advanced Topics and Troubleshooting
tutorials.description: Review discovery schedules, replication schedules, incremental replications, Windows VirtIO readiness, and common migration troubleshooting steps.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Troubleshooting resources and directions for receiving LiveLabs help.
